a:r.a:t: feel their compensation is not competitive
feel their compensation does not reflect their efforts
Employee survey reflects overall compensation satisfaction, with opportunities to improve compensation fairness, quota alignment, and lead quality
“I absolutely love my position and working for HGV... This company has changed my life.”
“The current targets are difficult to reach considering the recycled nature of the leads/tours given.”
“Pay is unsatisfactory in the high cost of living markets”
Summary of Key Findings across Sales, Marketing, and Telemarketing
“Amazing company to work for and I love my job assignment.”
“I do not believe our sales goals, nor compensation are realistic for our location.”
“The reputation in the industry is that our product is number one and our pay is not.”
